violations.text: Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 3-door low cooler by the pizza ovens. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

Several prepared food items and sliced deli meats and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Establishment does not keep up to date logs for time as a public health control for selling pizza by the slice. Approval for using time as a public health control is contingent on proper records and retention. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back exit by the hot water heater, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

Cooked chicken wings and other food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in coolers. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food items were relocated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both 3-door low boy units. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards in walk-in coolers #2 and #3 have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Refrigerator door gasket on True 3 door lowboy right door was observed in poor repair. Gasket shall be repaired or replaced New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (shelving in dry storage off kitchen was observed with an accumulation of dust, dirt, other unidentifiable debris. Shelving shall be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023

The ceiling in the kitchen (front and back) is constructed of acoustic tiles that are not are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Tiles shall be replaced as needed with non-acoustic non-absorbent smooth, durable and easily cleanable. Establishment is lacking coving between the walls and flooring. Area behind dish machine, food prep areas and high moisture areas shall be coved. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
